if p.exists():

mail.write_text('# BEM-867 INTERNAL AUDITOR RESPONSE\nStatus: PENDING_INTERNAL_AUDITOR_RESPONSE\n', encoding='utf-8')
objective = 'BEM-867 battle audit after mailbox patch. Produce substantive mailbox response. No issue comments.'

        'trace_id': 'bem867_battle_audit_mailbox',

        'task': objective

marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_QUEUE_RESTORED_AFTER_MAILBOX_PATCH.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 queue restored after mailbox patch\nStatus: LIVE_QUEUE_RESTORED\nMailbox reset: PENDING_INTERNAL_AUDITOR_RESPONSE\n', encoding='utf-8')
